Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint built on juneau-rest-server using the juneau-bean-mcp wire types.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp used by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
    Class
    Description
    McpCursor
    Pagination strategy for MCP list dispatchers (tools / prompts / resources).
    McpPage
    Slice of MCP descriptors returned by McpCursor.page(List, String, org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BeanStore).
    McpPromptHandler
    Handler for a single MCP prompt.
    McpResourceHandler
    Handler for a single MCP resource.
    McpServerConfig
    Aggregate configuration consumed by McpDispatcher.
    McpToolHandler
    Handler for a single MCP tool.
    McpTypedPromptHandler
    Typed variant of McpPromptHandler where MCP prompts/get arguments bind into a Juneau bean.
    McpTypedToolHandler
    Typed variant of McpToolHandler where MCP tools/call arguments bind into a Juneau bean.
